description: Hand-annotated call edges for Objective-C resolution benchmark

edges.notes: main() calls run() — plain C function call; extractor sees both as plain functions
[[UserService alloc] initWithRepository:repo] — message send constructor; full selector includes trailing colon
[svc createUserWithId:name:email:...] — message send on UserService instance; full multi-part selector
[svc getUserWithId:...] — message send on UserService instance; full selector includes trailing colon
[svc removeUserWithId:...] — message send on UserService instance; full selector includes trailing colon
[Validators isValidEmail:...] — class method message send; full selector includes trailing colon
[Validators isValidEmail:...] — class method message send; full selector includes trailing colon
[Validators isValidName:...] — class method message send; full selector includes trailing colon
[_repo saveWithId:name:...] — message send on UserRepository ivar; full selector
[_repo findById:...] — message send on UserRepository ivar; full selector includes trailing colon
[_repo deleteWithId:...] — message send on UserRepository ivar; full selector includes trailing colon
[self isValidName:...] — same-class class method call; full selector includes trailing colon
[self isValidEmail:...] — same-class class method call; full selector includes trailing colon
